header.title: Document Check — DocCheck
header.sub: Auto-review Invoice, PL, BL, CO, Contracts, Quotations
guide.title: User Guide
guide.what.desc: The bot checks the validity, completeness, and cross-matching of import-export documents based on the content you provide. The bot does NOT read PDF/Excel files — you need to type or copy content into the chat.
guide.inv.desc: Invoice number, date, buyer/seller, item description, quantity, unit price, total, payment terms, incoterm
guide.pl.desc: PL number, item description, packages, net/gross weight, marks & numbers, dimensions
guide.bl.desc: BL number, vessel name, port of loading/discharge, shipper/consignee, container, freight
guide.co.desc: CO number, issue date, exporter/importer, origin criteria, country of origin
guide.contract.desc: Contract number, date, parties, product, quantity, unit price, total value, payment, delivery, penalty
guide.quote.desc: Quote number, date, validity, buyer, product, quantity, unit price, total value, incoterm
guide.gdrive.1: Share file on Google Drive (Anyone with the link or Viewer permission)
guide.gdrive.2: Copy the share link from Google Drive (format drive.google.com/file/d/...)
guide.gdrive.3: Type in chat: "Check documents at link: [paste Google Drive link]"
guide.gdrive.4: Bot will automatically download the file, analyze document type and check it
guide.gdrive.note: Note: File must be shared publicly (Anyone with the link) for the bot to download
guide.howto.1: Type document content directly into the chat
guide.howto.2: Copy from email/file and paste — bot auto-detects document type
guide.howto.3: Send multiple documents at once — bot will cross-compare them
guide.howto.4: Bot replies in format: summary → per-file issues → cross-check
welcome.title: Hello! 👋
welcome.desc: I'm your document checking assistant. Send me document content (Invoice, PL, BL, CO, Contract, Quotation) or a Google Drive link, and I'll review it for you.
welcome.tip: You can send one or multiple documents at once for cross-comparison.
input.placeholder: Paste document content, Google Drive link, or ask a question...
footer.text: Duc Thinh New Materials Company — sales@ducthinh.com
